title: Codelens Reviews Log Entry
description: Minimal flat entry for .codelens/reviews.log. One object per review. Short keys keep each entry on a single line. The full report lives at `report`; this entry is just a log line.

report.description: Relative path to the markdown report.

tokIn.description: Input/prompt tokens used by this review (includes cached).

tokOut.description: Output/completion tokens used by this review.
